headline: How The Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) Investment Story Is Shifting After Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Philip Morris International’s fair value estimate has just been nudged down from US$195.17 to US$192.60, a small reset that still matters if you are tracking price targets closely. That shift comes as research houses pull in different directions, with some lifting targets into the US$200 range and others trimming them, reflecting a genuine split in how analysts view growth and execution. Read on to see what is driving those views and how you can keep up with the evolving narrative around the...
